steps.observed: Settings page rendered with 'AGENCY SETTINGS' header

steps.expected: Company information and configuration options visible
steps.observed: Four sections displayed: Company Information (name: Acme Delegation, wallet: Not connected), Backend Status (Connected, Live Supabase tables), Feature Tour (Replay Tour button), Onboarding (status: In progress, Reset Onboarding button)

steps.expected: Button visible in Feature Tour section
steps.observed: Replay Tour button visible in Feature Tour card with description 'Revisit the guided walkthrough of the platform'

Quick Tour modal appeared showing 'Cockpit' as step 1 of 7, with navigation dots for 7 tour stops (Cockpit, Dashboard, Kanban Board, Org Chart, Agents, Integrations, Settings), Skip Tour option, and Next button

assertions.title: Wallet address persisted to Supabase

steps.observed: VITE_DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true is active — AuthGate bypasses wallet check, useActiveAccount() returns undefined, no wallet is connected

assertions.issues: No real wallet connected in test environment — auth bypass active. useActiveAccount() returns undefined so no wallet address can be persisted to Supabase companies.wallet_address column. The useWalletAddressSync hook exists in code and is called from AuthGate.tsx, but cannot function without a connected wallet.

assertions.title: Connected wallet address displayed in header

steps.action: Navigate to /cockpit and inspect header area
steps.observed: Header shows page title, 'live runs' badge, 'approvals' badge, and Supabase link — no wallet address displayed

steps.action: Verify wallet display component exists in code
steps.expected: Component exists but may be hidden
steps.observed: AppShell.tsx (lines 100, 300-303) has conditional wallet address rendering: useTruncatedAddress() hook provides truncated address, rendered only when walletAddress is truthy. Since useActiveAccount() returns undefined (auth bypass), walletAddress is null and the element is not rendered.

assertions.issues: No real wallet connected in test environment. The wallet address display component EXISTS in AppShell.tsx (useTruncatedAddress hook + conditional render at lines 300-303) but is hidden because useActiveAccount() returns undefined with auth bypass active. Component is correctly implemented — it would show truncated address when a wallet is connected.

blockers.description: Auth bypass (VITE_DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true) prevents testing wallet-dependent features — useActiveAccount() returns undefined, so wallet address cannot be persisted to Supabase and header wallet display is conditionally hidden
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified component implementations exist in source code (useWalletAddressSync hook in AuthGate.tsx, useTruncatedAddress + conditional render in AppShell.tsx lines 300-303). Components are correctly wired but require a real wallet connection to function.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-SET-001, VAL-SET-002), 2 blocked (VAL-AUTH-003, VAL-AUTH-004 — no real wallet connected due to auth bypass). Settings page renders correctly with company info, backend status, feature tour, and onboarding sections. Replay Tour button successfully triggers 7-step Quick Tour tooltip sequence. Wallet-dependent features have correct implementations in code but cannot be exercised without a real wallet connection.
